title: Tupperware India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Tupperware India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Tupperware India South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Tupperware India South Asia Partners:
Tupperware India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tupperware India South Asia Partners!
